whatChanged: Added EXIF auto-orientation support for Immich and uploaded images

changes: Added EXIF auto-orientation correction for images from Immich and local uploads
New setting 'immichAutoOrientation' (enabled by default) to automatically rotate images based on EXIF orientation tag
Immich integration now fetches asset EXIF orientation via /api/assets/{id} endpoint
display_control.py applies EXIF orientation (1-8) before display direction rotation
Manual rotate buttons (left/right) now rotate relative to EXIF-corrected orientation
Upload handler extracts and preserves EXIF orientation in metadata API
Added timezone configuration (40 common IANA zones)
Added configurable clock date/time format (strftime patterns)
Added NTP time sync at startup (non-blocking, ntpdate → systemd fallback)
Added manual 'Sync Time Now' button in settings
strftime pattern validation with user feedback
Fixed Immich album asset fetching in immich_handler.py
Replaced broken GET /api/albums/{id}/assets endpoint (404 in Immich v2+) with POST /api/search/metadata using albumIds filter
Album assets now correctly retrieved via search/metadata API which supports album filtering
Fixed pixel-mapper configuration logic in display_control.py
U-mapper now only used when parallelChains > 1 AND chainLength >= 4 AND chainLength is even (U-shaped/serpentine panel layouts)
For normal single-chain setups (parallelChains=1) or invalid U-mapper configs, only rotation is applied
Prevents incorrect display on standard panel chains that aren't arranged in U-shape
Fixed Immich API integration - updated all endpoints to current Immich v2+ API
Replaced deprecated GET /api/asset/random with POST /api/search/random
Replaced deprecated GET /api/album/{id} with GET /api/albums/{id}
Replaced deprecated GET /api/asset/file/{id} with GET /api/assets/{id}/original
Fixed search_assets response parsing for new SearchAssetResponseDto format
Added fallback to /original when edited thumbnail not available
Settings now reload on each API call (fixes stale config issue)
Added detailed error logging for 404/401/403 responses with actionable messages
Added comprehensive unit tests for all Immich handler functions (13 new tests)
Updated immich_controller.py to extract asset_id from URLs for download
Added .gitignore to exclude settings.json, info.json, uploaded images, and Python cache from git tracking
Fixed update_application.sh: removed fragile settings.json backup/restore that caused git conflicts
Replaced sudo reboot with Flask app restart (pkill + nohup python3 app.py) - no full system reboot needed
Added proper logging to /home/pi/update_application.log for debugging update issues
Added error handling and verification that Flask app restarts successfully after update
Updated install_application.sh to create .gitignore after cloning
Added Immich integration for displaying photos from Immich server
Immich configuration in settings (URL, API key, album ID, search query)
Per-source-type display duration settings (random, album, search)
Immich display controls on Demo tab (Random, Album, Search, Stop)
Album selection modal with AJAX-loaded album dropdown
Exponential backoff retry for Immich and Giphy (10s → 20s → 40s → max 300s)
Home Assistant MQTT integration for Immich (4 buttons + state switch)
Self-hosted Material Icons and custom CSS/JS (no Google CDN dependencies)
New start screen
Updated animations
Better scrolling
New start screen
Updated animations
Better scrolling
